cause_analysis.narrative: Pure Luxury Medspa LLC churned on 2026-02-02 after 227 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-02-01 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-02-01 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.

I'll have your account manager reach out to assist you further with any concerns. Thank you for your patience!

Hello Angelina, How have you been?

So before you make the switch, I'd really recommend asking them that how often do they optimize? Do they adjust for seasonal demand changes? Are they doing ongoing competition analysis in your specific area? Because if it's just a set-it-and-forget-it approach, that price difference might not be the value it seems like…
I had a conversation with my finance team, and we have come up with a concession where you can pay $179 instead of $249 moving forward each month.

Every 10-12 days, we're analyzing your competition, optimizing your keywords based on what people are actually searching for right now, and adjusting your strategy to capture clients within that 8-10 mile radius where you're most likely to convert searches into booked appointments.
